message:
feat(fuzz): add message deserialization, round-trip, and session JSONL fuzz targets

Adds three additional libfuzzer harnesses from concurrent agent work:

- fuzz_message_deser.rs: Fuzzes UserContent/ContentBlock/AssistantMessage
  JSON deserialization with arbitrary bytes, testing serde paths for
  message model types that receive untrusted input from provider APIs.

- fuzz_message_roundtrip.rs: Extends message deserialization fuzzing with
  serialize→deserialize round-trip assertions — any successfully parsed
  message must survive a JSON round-trip with discriminant stability.

- fuzz_session_jsonl.rs: Fuzzes the full session JSONL loading pipeline
  including multi-line JSONL files with mixed valid/invalid entries,
  testing open_jsonl_with_diagnostics() recovery behavior.

Also registers fuzz_message_deser and fuzz_message_roundtrip as [[bin]]
targets in fuzz/Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,3 +55,13 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_session_entry"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_session_entry.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_message_deser"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_message_deser.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_message_roundtrip"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_message_roundtrip.rs"
+doc = false
